title: Gold: Implement incremental fact_procurement updates
description: Update silver-to-gold2.Notebook to use Delta MERGE for fact_procurement instead of overwrite. Merge on surrogate keys, update existing rows, insert new. Dimension tables (country, material, date, indicator, stage) remain full overwrite (SCD Type 1). Run OPTIMIZE after MERGE.
acceptanceCriteria: fact_procurement uses Delta MERGE (not overwrite) when p_full_load=false
MERGE key: surrogate keys (date_key + material_key + supplier_hq_country_key + production_country_key)
fact_supply_share and fact_epi_score remain full overwrite (annual external data)
Dimension tables remain full overwrite (SCD Type 1)
OPTIMIZE runs on fact_procurement after MERGE
No duplicate records after multiple incremental loads
notes: Gold layer MERGE is the highest-value change — eliminates DirectLake full reload
Quality observability tables should also update incrementally if possible

Implemented: (1) Added parameter cell with p_full_load/p_from_date at top of notebook with Fabric inputsV2 metadata, (2) Added merge_tbl() helper function alongside write_tbl() — uses DeltaTable.forName, MERGE with whenMatchedUpdateAll/whenNotMatchedInsertAll, followed by OPTIMIZE, (3) Replaced fact_procurement write_tbl call with conditional: overwrite on full load or first run, MERGE on incremental using 4-key condition (date_key + material_key + supplier_hq_country_key + production_country_key). All dimension tables, fact_epi_score, fact_supply_share, and unmapped audit remain full overwrite. Self-review: verified notebook format preserved, all 47 existing tests pass.

task_verification.notes: All acceptance criteria met. Parameter cell with Fabric inputsV2 metadata added. merge_tbl function correctly implements DeltaTable.forName + MERGE + OPTIMIZE. fact_procurement conditionally uses overwrite (full load/first run) or MERGE (incremental) with 4-key condition. All dimension tables, fact_epi_score, fact_supply_share, and unmapped audit remain full overwrite. 47/47 tests pass.

verification_history.notes: All 6 acceptance criteria verified. Implementation matches spec and design reference.
